position.subline: For those who don't wait for special occasions, but create them.

paragraphs: The story goes that during Cuba's wars of independence, women slipped secret messages to guerrilleros into the petals of the Mariposa flower, the white butterfly ginger that became the national flower in 1936.

Every Mariposa carries a secret of its own. In place of a printed band, a 24-carat gold leaf is laid onto the wrapper by hand. A quiet reminder that life isn't just to be lived. It is meant to be celebrated every day.
